question: What is the relative position of the mountain to the other objects in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The mountain is to the right of the city. (B) The mountain is to the left of the city. (C) The mountain is in front of the city. (D) The mountain is behind the city.
gold_answer: The mountain is behind the city
answer_choices: The mountain is to the right of the city
The mountain is to the left of the city
The mountain is in front of the city
The mountain is behind the city
